notes: No model identified Hundertwasser as the artist (consistent with the prompt note that this is rare). The best performers (qwen3.6-35b-a3b|nothink, qwen3.6-27b|nothink, gemma4-26b-a4b|think, qwen3.5-4b|nothink) all explicitly noted the 2 red dots on cheeks - a signature Hundertwasser motif. None of the models called the dark ground 'water', which is good. qwen3.6-27b|think made the closest 'ocean' hallucination by suggesting the background could be 'deep ocean'. Several models fabricated signature dates (gemma4-31b '2015', qwen3.5-9b '2005', qwen3-vl-4b '1978', gemma4-12b '2011', qwen3.6-27b '1993') - none correctly read 1965. gemma4-e4b hallucinated two faces when only one exists. qwen3.5-4b|think produced an empty/truncated response. The 'nothink' variants of qwen3.5-4b, qwen3.5-9b, qwen3.6-27b, and qwen3.6-35b-a3b all outperformed or matched their 'think' counterparts, suggesting thinking mode does not help on this image.
